reason: Browser-use feature allows agent to successfully open a browser, navigate to a URL, retrieve page state (including title), and report back with the correct page title "Example Domain".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Gamut application home page with agent list in sidebar.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260701-011203-nu1j" agent in the sidebar - Successfully navigated to the agent configuration page showing the chat interface.
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message successfully submitted to the agent via the chat input textbox; agent status changed to "working".
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) - Agent completed processing in 4 seconds (total work time: 13 seconds); "Working..." indicator disappeared, indicating completion.
